topic_statement: Pinned: How do we measure progress toward AGI? It takes a village – and a bit of healthy competition. 🛠️ We’re launching a global hackathon with @Kaggle to build new cognitive evaluations for AI. With $200k in prizes up for grabs, help us put our framework to the test. Join the challenge → https://goo.gle/4uqOVKK
why_now: Clustered 2 recent signals across 2 source families with verifiable anchors.
